response.overview: Joaquin is a driving instructor who teaches undocumented immigrants how to drive, taking them to Utah so they can get drivers' licenses in a State that doesn't require a SSN. One day, after a lesson with Nayeli, a new student who catches his attention, a Homeland Security agent shows up at his door. Joaquin must help the agent arrest his boss, Lalo, during their next drop-off, or he will be locked away. Will he save himself or the people he has been helping?
response.title: Interstate
